title: Communauté de communes du Canton de Valmont
summary: The communauté de communes du Canton de Valmont was located in the Seine-Maritime département of the Normandy region of northern France. It was created in January 2000. It was merged into the Communauté d'agglomération de Fécamp Caux Littoral in January 2017.
text:
The communauté de communes du Canton de Valmont was located in the Seine-Maritime département of the Normandy region of northern France. It was created in January 2000. It was merged into the Communauté d'agglomération de Fécamp Caux Littoral in January 2017.

Participants
The Communauté de communes comprised the following communes:
